High lights: Info: Experience life above the ordinary at Altitude, Bendorewell, a premium residential address crafted for those who aspire higher. Altitude at Bendoorwell, Mangalore is a 31-storey premium residential project offering only 29 limited-edition luxury apartments. Designed for those who value exclusivity and sophistication, each residence provides spacious layouts, high-end finishes, and panoramic city views. Located in one of Mangalore's most sought-after neighbourhoods, Altitude combines elegant architecture, privacy, and world-class amenities to create an elevated living experience. With a grand entrance lobby, modern clubhouse, fitness zone, and secure parking, Altitude stands as a new benchmark for luxury apartments in Mangalore where urban convenience meets refined living.

3D Floor Plan: Upper Ground Floor Plan

High lights: Info: Welcome to Laxmi Govind, where elegance meets comfort in the heart of Mangaluru. This exceptional residential project, comprising ground plus five floors, is designed to offer you the perfect blend of modern living and tranquil surroundings. Laxmi Govind features 25 spacious and well-planned apartments, with four 3BHK and one 2BHK on each floor. The 2BHK apartments span 1188 square feet, while the 3BHK units range from 1626 to 1744 square feet, ensuring ample space for your family's needs. The ground floor offers dedicated car parking, while the rooftop boasts a covered community space for social gatherings and relaxation. Located in the serene Kadri Alvares Road locality, Laxmi Govind provides easy access to schools, colleges, places of worship, public transport, markets, and shopping centers. Promoted by Land Trades Builders and Developers, Mangaluru’s Premium property developers with 32 years of experience and 42 completed projects, this project exemplifies high-quality construction, transparency, and timely completion. Approved by RERA and all other mandatory authorities, Laxmi Govind is a home like no other. It’s where quality, comfort and convenience synchronize in optimum harmony.

High lights: Info: Discover luxurious living at Krishna Kuteera, an exquisite 14- storey residential complex by Land Trades Builders and Developers Pvt. Ltd. Located on Kadri Kambla Road, Kadri, Mangalore, Krishna Kuteera seamlessly blends modern living with old-world charm. This architectural marvel features spacious apartments with state-of-the-art amenities, including ample parking on the ground floor and two spacious basements, as well as a fully equipped gymnasium and fitness center on the first floor. The complex offers 4BHK and 3BHK apartments on each floor, designed to provide ample space and natural light, creating an ambiance of elegance and tranquility. Strategically located, Krishna Kuteera ensures easy access to markets, schools, colleges, places of worship, shopping areas, public transport, and hospitals, meeting all your daily needs with convenience. Experience modern luxury and serene living at Krishna Kuteera, where everyday life becomes a delight.

High lights: Info: BMK Sky Villa will be a premium-quality residential development situated in Vas Lane, one of the most elite residential localities in Mangalore City. It will have 24 floors with only one spacious 4-bedroom apartment per floor, thereby giving the residents greater exclusivity, privacy, safety and security. The project will include reserved vehicle parking, a posh entrance lobby and reception area, and a common club house with a variety of features for health, fitness and lifestyle.

Info: Pristine is set to redefine waterfront living , the truly unique commercial cum residential development offers an unrivalled level of privacy and security. With only 100 bespoke 3 & 4 BHK residences, each with their own private beachfront and direct view access to the turquoise waters of the Arabian Sea. Pristine Offers stunning views of the sea, and has a yoga / Meditation Studio to help you stay healthy and fit, With top-notch amenities and a prime location, this is the perfect place to call home. The development will bring a much-needed sense of space and luxury to the area. The project offers outdoor amenities like tennis courts, kids play area, basketball court, Gazebo, Sitting areas as well as plenty of indoor space for the whole family to enjoy.

High lights: Info: Bendoorwell is at the cusp of modernity and heritage. The area of historic neighbourhoods with landmarks like the St Sebastain church surrounded by quaint by lanes. At the centre of it all will be Altura , a landmark of luxury living that is all set to redefine the horizon of Mangaluru. Located in the heart of Bendoorwell , Land Trades Altura offers . Its residents the best of both worlds. A state-of-the-art lifestyle, replete with the finest luxuries and an unrivalled location that is well connected to the roots of the city. Altura consists of luxurious 3, 4 BHK apartments that offer spectacular views of the harbour, the bay, the greenery of the valley view and Mangaluru's enchanting cityscape. Altura is more than just a home — it’s a whole new perspective. Every apartment in Land Trades Altura offers at least two distinct views, of the sea and harbour, of Mangaluru's iconic skyline, or the lush green landscape that surrounds this premium property.

COMMON AREAS AND FACILITIES: Commercial Building with Upper Ground Floor plus Four Floors and car parking at Lower Ground plus Two Basement levels.
Entry Ramps down to Basements, toilets, lift, lobby, corridors, lift-rooms, electric rooms.
There will be a staircase leading to the premises on each floor.
Two nos of Automatic Elevators of 8 Passengers capacity with lift machine room.
Common lobby/corridors for all the premises on all the floors.
Separate General Toilet Facilities for ladies & Gents in all the Floors.
Every Shop fitted with rolling shutters with necessary locking arrangements.
Safety Railings for Passages & Staircase.
100% Generator Backup for Common Area Lightings, Services and inside the premises
Electrical provisions in Common Areas and Car parking Yard.
Separate electricity meter for recording electricity consumption.
One common electricity meter for water sump, for common lighting points at the entrance, at staircase, landings and for lifts.
One common water meter for protected water supply provided by the Corporation.
Centralized CC Camera Network in common areas & Parking.
Covered Roof Top at Terrace.
Overhead tank on the top floor, which shall supply water to all the floors.
Solar provision for common area lighting.
Fire Protection System as per National Building Regulations.
Watchman’s room and servant’s toilet.
Common Car Parking in the Lower Ground plus two Basement Floors.
STRUCTURE (SHELL AND CORE): RCC frame structure with Column, Beam and Slab with high grade steel and A-1 quality of concrete finishes.
9” thick Laterite stone masonry for External walls and 6” thick Laterite stone masonry for Partition walls.
Trovel finished neat plastering for internal ceiling and walls.
Internal surfaces covered with single coat plastering and Double coat plastering for External surfaces with water proofing treatment.
Toilets are provided with sunken slabs with proper water proofing and concealed Pipelining.
PREMISES ENTRANCE AND VENTILATION: Structural glazing curtain walls and ACP cladding as per Elevation features.
FLOORING WORKS: Vitrified tile flooring for office space and shops.
Granite/Tile Flooring for Staircase and Common areas.
Designer Glazed Vitrified Tiles for wall surfaces in Toilets and Antiskid Tiles for flooring.
Interlock Paving or VDF Concrete Flooring for Driveway & Car parking Yard.
PAINTING WORKS: Acrylic Putty finished Internal emulsion to internal ceiling, walls and passage.
Exterior emulsion paint for external exposed surface of the building.
External painting to ceiling of parking area.
ELECTRICAL WORKS: Modular Electrical Switches & Premium Quality Wires and DB Fittings.
Nominal Electrical Points with DB provision inside the Premises.
Provision of air-conditioning for all office/shop premises.
Provision of 5 KW power for shops having area within 1000 sq.mtrs. and from 1000 sq.mtrs to 1500 sq.mtrs power provision is 8 KW.
OTHER GENERAL FEATURES: Premium Quality CP Plumbing Fittings in Toilets.
Premium Quality Sanitary Wares in Toilets.
UPVC Frames with Fibrotech Shutters for Toilet Doors with Quality Fixtures.
RCC underground sump and RCC overhead tank at terrace
Bore well/ Corporation water connection facility.
Provision of Waterline & Sewage line for each shop.
Provision of STP Tank and Equipments.
One D.G. set with soundproof enclosure.

High lights: Info: Synergy is a modern commercial complex on Airport Road in Mangalore's Yeyyadi area. It will have a ground floor and four upper storeys, featuring showrooms, shops, boutiques, offices and consultation chambers. The building will provide user-friendly amenities like parking, broad passages, elevators, toilets, water and power supply.
